global.titulo: Pablo Cansinos — Consulting, Strategy & Project Management
tema.conmutar: Switch between light and dark theme
inicio.propuesta: Consultant based in Madrid. Business diagnosis, AI adoption and international project management.
perfil.parrafo1: At AiKit, in Madrid, I work as a Strategy Consultant & AI. I help companies to understand their operations, identify pain points and translate business needs into practical recommendations involving AI, automation and digital tools.
perfil.parrafo2: Before that, I managed international projects at ESIC University for two years and worked with a portfolio of hotels at Expedia Group, from Prague.
perfil.parrafo3: What interests me is the stretch between analysis and decision: understanding how an organization works, measuring it and proposing what to change.
perfil.parrafo4: I want to keep growing in strategy consulting, digital transformation, operations and project management.
areas.consultoria.texto: Diagnosing a company’s situation and providing recommendations for decision-makers. It’s what I do today at AiKit.
areas.procesos.texto: How work gets done today, where time is lost and what can be streamlined. I’ve done this as an operations and customer experience analyst.
areas.proyectos.texto: Coordinating projects with multiple stakeholders and following through to completion, in international settings and with partner institutions.
areas.datos.texto: Analyzing data to answer business questions and track indicators. Tools I use: Excel, Google Analytics and Looker Studio.
trayectoria.aikit.contexto: AiKit supports companies in adopting artificial intelligence. The work is diagnostic and advisory, not technical implementation.
trayectoria.aikit.contribucion: I lead diagnostic sessions with client teams and review the resulting reports, so every recommendation is grounded in what came up in the session.
trayectoria.aikit.evidencia: 50+ diagnostic sessions and 100+ reports reviewed, averaging 8 recommendations per client.
trayectoria.expedia.cargo: Partner Success Associate — Business Performance & Partner Advisory
trayectoria.expedia.contexto: Expedia Group works with the hotels that list their properties on the platform; the partner advisory team is their point of contact for business performance.
trayectoria.expedia.contribucion: I managed a portfolio of hotels: reviewing their performance on the platform and delivering recommendations from that analysis, in direct contact with each property.
trayectoria.esic.contexto: ESIC University’s international office coordinates student and staff mobility with partner institutions across five continents.
trayectoria.esic.contribucion: I managed mobility projects end to end: calls for applications, coordination with partner institutions, grant tracking and case-by-case problem-solving.
trayectoria.esic.evidencia: 700+ students a year, 80+ staff mobilities and €130,000 in grants managed.
trayectoria.orange.contribucion: I supported the shift to an omnichannel sales model through channel analysis, reporting and coordination across sales management, distributors and partner outlets. I built Excel databases that streamlined CRM testing and process management for public and SME clients.
trayectoria.gmp.texto: Customer experience analysis. The user base grew 27% in two months.
trayectoria.payflow.texto: Designed a semi-automated WhatsApp acquisition process that grew the user base by 170% and raised app adoption from 18% to 27%.
proyectos.intro: Almas Inquietas turns sport into social impact: it runs charity tournaments and challenges, builds a community around each event and gives what it raises to a specific cause. I collaborate in organizing those events as an associate member.
proyectos.futbol.texto: A day of football as an excuse to bring lots of people together for a good cause. All the proceeds went to Ideorama, an association that works with children and families on education, responsible use of technology and healthy leisure. I collaborated in organizing the event.
proyectos.futbol.patrocinadores: Backed by sponsors including Día, Telepizza and Pozuelo Town Council.
proyectos.padel.texto: We repeated the formula a few months later, this time on the padel courts and in pairs. Same spirit, same cause: what we raised again went entirely to Ideorama. I collaborated in organizing the tournament.
proyectos.padel.patrocinadores: Backed by sponsors including MG Albian Motor, Padel Bularas, Blas Méndez Ponce, Minigymrats, Cañas y Tapas, Día and Herbalife.
proyectos.rtw.texto: Almas Inquietas’ most ambitious challenge so far. Co-founder Alejandro de Santiago cycles across Europe from Prague to Madrid: nine countries and over 30,000 metres of elevation gain, more than three times Everest. Meanwhile, anyone can join in from Strava and add their kilometres. The rule is simple, one kilometre is one euro, and the goal is €4,000: just enough to pay for a whole class’s school meals for an entire school year at Fundación Verón, which trains young people in Honduras.
proyectos.rtw.contribucion: The project runs on digital tools and artificial intelligence: a real-time kilometre counter connected to Strava, a website that follows the route stage by stage, and a crowdfunding campaign with public tracking. I collaborate on getting it up and running.
formacion.esic.titulacion2: Higher Degree in Global Marketing Management
formacion.esic.nota: Both degrees were bilingual programs, completed in parallel.
cert.aicad.nombre: Course in Digital Business Transformation and Business Models
idiomas.ingles.nivel: C1, certified with Cambridge C1 Advanced
idiomas.internacional: International experience in Colombia, Texas and Prague. At ESIC University, I worked daily with partner institutions across five continents.
contacto.texto: If you’re looking for someone for a role in consulting, strategy, operations or projects, get in touch and let’s talk.
